news.headline: Valeura Energy Inc. confirms safety of all personnel after Myanmar earthquake. (Characters: 77)
news.summary: In Singapore on March 28, 2025, international energy company Valeura Energy Inc. (TSX:VLE, OTCQX:VLERF) reassures that all its employees are safe and unharmed after the earthquake that occurred in Myanmar.

news.headline: AMD CEO Lisa Su was named Time's CEO of the year for innovation in tech, including focusing on data centers and AI. In a 2018 interview, she called blockchain "very important." If $1,000 was invested in AMD back then, it could earn significantly now.
news.summary: Lisa Su, the CEO of Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD), has steered the company to become a major player in the chip industry, competing with giants like Nvidia and Intel. Recently, Time Magazine named Su as their CEO of the year, recognizing her leadership and focus on innovation in areas such as data centers and artificial intelligence. Su's insights on artificial intelligence, semiconductors, and other emerging technologies have garnered attention from industry observers and tech enthusiasts. Apart from these topics, Su's views on blockchains, seen as a revolutionary technology of the 21st century, have also intrigued many. In an interview with CNBC on April 26, 2018, Su emphasized the significance of blockchain technology. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

Cheche Group Inc. (NASDAQ: CCG) unveils Q4 and full-year 2024 unaudited financial results in Beijing, March 28, 2025.
news.summary: Beijing, on March 28, 2025 - Cheche Group Inc. revealed its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2024. The company is identified on NASDAQ as CCG and is known as China's top auto insurance technology platform. The financial report showcased key figures from its operations during the mentioned period, displaying the company's performance and standing within the market.

news.summary: Integra Resources Corp. announced the appointment of Sean Deissner as Vice President. The company, listed on TSXV as ITR and NYSE American as ITRG, shared the news on March 28, 2025. For more information, visit www.integraresources.com.

news.headline: Seven2 to acquire majority stake in HRK LUNIS from J.C. Flowers, a leading German wealth management platform. Munich, March 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Munich on March 28, 2025, Seven2, a prominent European private equity firm, revealed a significant development. They have formally entered into a binding agreement with J.C. Flowers & Co., a private investment firm specializing in the financial services sector. The agreement entails Seven2 acquiring a majority stake in HRK LUNIS.

news.headline: 15 healthcare press releases highlighted for the week, including 2025 Main Residency Match® results and a new app for hand specialists.
news.summary: This week, several significant healthcare announcements were made, such as the release of the 2025 Main Residency Match® results and the introduction of a new app designed for healthcare hand specialists. The press releases were part of a roundup from PR Newswire in New York on March 28, 2025. The Main Residency Match® outcomes are crucial for medical students seeking residency placements, while the "hands on" app aims to enhance the practice of hand specialists. The volume of weekly press releases in the healthcare sector underscores the industry's dynamism and innovation.

news.headline: Hyperscale Data's first Nvidia GPU installation for HPC customer in Silicon Valley marks milestone in company's transformation.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS) revealed the completion of its initial Nvidia GPU setup for a fresh cloud services entity in Silicon Valley. The Company's ongoing endeavor in revamping its Michigan data center into an advanced artificial intelligence and high-performance computing hub sees a substantial leap with this development.

news.headline: LYB to announce first-quarter 2025 financial results on April 25, 2025, followed by a webcast at 11 a.m. EDT.
news.summary: LyondellBasell, a prominent player in the chemical industry, is set to reveal its financial performance for Q1 2025 on Friday, April 25. The announcement will be made before the U.S. market opens, with a subsequent webcast and teleconference at 11 a.m. EDT on the same day. David Kinney, the head of investor relations, will host the discussion. To join, access the webcast on www.lyondellbasell.com/earnings 10 to 15 minutes before the call begins.

news.headline: Seritage Growth Properties CEO to step down, Adam Metz appointed as CEO effective April 11, 2025.
news.summary: Seritage Growth Properties (NYSE: SRG) has revealed that their Chief Executive Officer and President, Andrea Olshan, will be resigning from her position, along with stepping down from the Board of Trustees, effective April 11, 2025. The decision was reached by mutual agreement between the Board and Ms. Olshan. Board Chairman Adam Metz, an independent member since 2022, has been appointed to takeover after her departure. Seritage specializes in owning and developing retail, residential, and mixed-use properties on a national scale.

news.headline: Weekly recap highlights 11 key finance press releases, covering Consumer Confidence Index, teen financial literacy data, & U.S. Bank's new debit card for tipped employees.
news.summary: This week's top financial news updates from PR Newswire include the unveiling of the latest Consumer Confidence Index® and insightful figures on teen financial literacy. Additionally, U.S. Bank introduced a novel debit card tailored for tipped employees. The announcements were made on March 28, 2025 in New York. The data release encompasses crucial statistics and trends impacting consumer sentiment and economic outlook. Furthermore, the focus on teen financial literacy sheds light on the importance of educating younger generations on managing finances effectively. U.S. Bank's initiative to launch a specialized debit card for tipped workers signifies efforts to cater to the unique needs of this workforce segment. Stay tuned for more updates and analysis on these significant developments.

news.headline: Recap of 15 consumer news stories, including Fireball's senior discount and Chili's Scranton Branch grand opening.
news.summary: This week, major consumer and retail announcements caught attention, with Fireball introducing a senior citizen discount and Chili's Scranton Branch celebrating its grand opening. In New York on March 28, 2025, PR Newswire highlighted these updates among the multitude of press releases shared. The discount for senior citizens at Fireball aims to attract older customers, while the new Chili's branch in Scranton promises exciting dining experiences. Stay informed with the latest developments in the industry through PR Newswire's extensive coverage of thousands of press releases weekly.

news.headline: Fosun International refinanced USD 870 million syndicated loan due in 2025, successfully completed.
news.summary: Fosun International, a leading company in Hong Kong (HKEX stock code: 00656), announced on March 28, 2025, that it has effectively refinanced a syndicated loan valuing USD 870 million. The loan was set to mature on the same day.

news.headline: LY Corp refutes rumors of partnership with Soneium, Sony's Ethereum layer-2 project. Soneium clarified the collaboration for onchain Mini Apps with LINE. LY Corp is a Japanese tech titan with Line Next raising $140M in Dec '23 and surpassing 35M users in Mar '24. Soneium partners with Animoca Brands for Web3 anime promotion. Japan's anime content draws interest globally. Magazine hints at blockchain troubles in Asia.
news.summary: LY Corporation denied rumors of a partnership with Sony-backed Soneium on March 28, refuting media reports. Soneium clarified the collaboration aimed to integrate onchain Mini Apps into Line's ecosystem. LY Corporation, a Japanese tech giant resulting from a major merger, owns Line Next, which secured $140 million in funding in 2023. Line Next's "Mini Dapps" on Line messenger reached 35 million users, with top app generating $773,000 in launch month. Soneium, backed by Sony, focuses on NFTs linked to Amazon Prime Video content and recently partnered with Animoca Brands to promote anime culture in Web3. Rahul Purini of Crunchyroll revealed 800 million non-Chinese and non-Japanese viewers of anime content in a 2024 interview.

news.headline: Invi Grid partners with Cowbell Rx for proactive cybersecurity in insurance; boosts policyholders' cyber risk posture.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Invi Grid has recently become a part of Cowbell Rx Cybersecurity Marketplace under the hashtag CowbellInsurance. This move aims to enhance the cyber risk posture of insurance policyholders through proactive cyber risk management. This partnership signifies a step towards better cybersecurity practices for policyholders, with the company offering advanced solutions to mitigate cyber threats.

news.headline: Telecom Egypt collaborates with Truecaller to improve customer experience, reinventing communication for its users.
news.summary: In Cairo, a new partnership has formed between Telecom Egypt and Truecaller, aiming to revolutionize customer communication and experience. This collaboration brings together the expertise of Telecom Egypt, a prominent telecommunications company, with Truecaller, a renowned communication platform. Through this partnership, both companies seek to enhance the quality of customer interactions and services. This strategic alliance is expected to significantly impact the customer base of both entities, with Telecom Egypt serving millions of customers and Truecaller boasting a large user base globally. The cooperation between these two firms is forecasted to bring about substantial improvements in communication technology and customer service, ultimately benefitting millions of users.

news.headline: TPH Academy teams up with Mas Camarena School & IDA Spain to offer elite student-athletes a premier academic & athletic experience in Valencia.
news.summary: In Valencia, Spain, on March 28, 2025, TPH Academy revealed their collaboration with Mas Camarena School and the International Development Academy (IDA) Spain. This partnership aims to provide top-tier academic and athletic opportunities for high-performing student-athletes in Valencia. This initiative will cater to elite individuals seeking a comprehensive educational and sports experience.

news.headline: Andrew Candreva named Director of Strategy at Tantus Tech, a federal IT consulting leader, to boost growth.
news.summary: Arlington, Virginia - On March 28, 2025, Tantus Technologies, Inc. welcomed Mr. Andrew Candreva as its new Director of Strategy. Tantus, a prominent player in federal IT consulting, aims to boost its presence in the existing Federal markets with Mr. Candreva's expertise. This move underlines Tantus' commitment to expanding its reach and enhancing its services.

news.headline: 941 form in ezPaycheck updated for 1st quarter deadline with Efile feature, aiding client compatibility.
news.summary: ezPaycheck, a payroll software by Halfpricesoft.com, has been updated to incorporate the 2025 941 forms, with a new E-File feature for client convenience. The revamp was done in REDMOND, Wash., announced on March 28, 2025. This upgrade is just in time for the 1st quarter deadline on April 30, 2025.

news.headline: TPH Academy opens in Cedar Park, Texas at The Crossover, offering elite academics and athletics.
news.summary: In Cedar Park, Texas, on March 28, 2025, TPH Academy announced the opening of its latest facility at The Crossover in Austin. This new location aims to offer student-athletes an exceptional combination of academic and athletic training opportunities. The expansion provides a unique setting where young learners can engage in comprehensive development programs.

news.headline: Emeren Group announces CEO transition: Yumin Liu stepping down April 30, Julia Xu appointed Interim CEO from May 1.
news.summary: Norwalk, Connecticut - On March 28, 2025, Emeren Group Ltd, a prominent solar project developer listed under NYSE:SOL, announced that its Chief Executive Officer, Mr. Yumin Liu, will be stepping down from his position on April 30, 2025. The Board of Directors has assigned Ms. Julia Xu, an existing independent director, as the Interim CEO starting from May 1, 2025. Emeren has commenced a formal search for the next CEO, evaluating both internal and external candidates. Mr. Liu held the CEO position for a tenure exceeding five years.

news.headline: China Automotive Systems reported 12.9% revenue increase to $650.9 million in 2024, with EPS sales up 29.9% to $188.7 million.
news.summary: China Automotive Systems, Inc. reported its unaudited financial results for Q4 and fiscal year 2024. Q4 net sales increased by 18.6% to $188.7 million, gross profit was $29.5 million with a 15.6% margin. Operating income decreased to $8.7 million. For the fiscal year, net sales reached $650.9 million, gross profit increased to $109.2 million, and operating income rose to $40.3 million. EPS sales grew by 29.9% in 2024. The company's total cash at year-end was $129.4 million. The CEO highlighted the growth in EPS and different market performances. The company also provided revenue guidance of $700.0 million for 2025. EPS sales represented 38.9% of revenue in 2024 compared to 33.8% in 2023. Total cash and cash equivalents were $129.4 million as of December 31, 2024, though total accounts receivable including notes receivable were $343.5 million. The company had a net cash flow of $9.8 million in 2024 and plans for a conference call on March 28, 2025, to discuss the results. China Automotive Systems, Inc. is a leading power steering components supplier in China.

news.headline: Tony Makuch resigns from West Red Lake Gold Board of Directors to focus on new company demands.
news.summary: West Red Lake Gold expresses gratitude to Tony Makuch for his service on the Board of Directors as he steps down to concentrate on significant new obligations as the CEO of another company.

news.headline: Enlight wins Israel's 1st land tender for integrated data center & renewable energy facility in Ashalim, Southern Israel.
news.summary: A company has acquired a significant portion of land in southern Israel to establish an innovative data center, which will incorporate renewable energy sources to aid in the expansion of the national infrastructure. This development marks a substantial investment in the region's technological infrastructure, as the data center is expected to facilitate the processing and storage of vast amounts of information. The integration of renewable energy into the data center's operations highlights a commitment to sustainable practices, contributing to an eco-friendly approach to technological advancements in the country. The project is anticipated to create numerous job opportunities and foster economic growth in the surrounding area.

news.headline: Aimia reports strong Q4 2024 results, with $127.2M revenue, $17.3M adj. EBITDA, and $41.2M net loss. Achieved FY 2024 guidance with $500.8M revenue and $51.3M adj. EBITDA. Initiatives in place to enhance shareholder value.
news.summary: Aimia Inc reported its financial results for Q4 2024 with consolidated revenue of $127.2 million, up 27.1% from Q4 2023, and Adjusted EBITDA of $17.3 million, a significant improvement from a loss in Q4 2023. In 2024, the company's core holdings generated $80.4 million of adjusted EBITDA, achieving the company's guidance. Aimia ended 2024 with $95.4 million in cash and cash equivalents. The company launched a Substantial Issuer Bid and completed agreements with Paladin Private Equity. Aimia's liquidity declined to $95.5 million in Q4, with notable impacts on Bozzetto's repayments. The company also had $1,003 million in tax losses available for carry forward. Rhys Summerton was named Executive Chairman, succeeding Tom Finke. The company's focus is on initiatives to enhance shareholder value post-completion of the Substantial Issuer Bid.

news.headline: Galaxy Digital Holdings Ltd. released Q4 2024 results: Net income was $174M (Q4) and $365M (FY 2024) inclusive of a $166M legal provision. Operating costs increased significantly. $4.5B expected revenue from partnership with CoreWeave. Assets under management grew significantly. Galaxy filed an amendment towards listing on Nasdaq. U.S. taxpayers advised regarding significant adverse tax consequences due to PFIC status. Shareholders must make certain elections before April 15, 2025. Conference call on March 28. Assets at $7.2B as of December 31, 2024.ystatechange
news.summary: Galaxy Digital Holdings Ltd. released financial results for the three and twelve months ended December 31, 2024, with a net income of $174 million for Q4 and $365 million for the full year 2024, including a $166 million legal provision from a settlement with the New York Attorney General. YTD net loss before tax is estimated to be between $275-325 million. The company entered a 15-year lease agreement with CoreWeave for its Helios Data Center, expecting $4.5 billion in total revenue. Q4 2024 saw $68.1 million in counterparty trading revenue, a 26% QoQ increase, and $22.1 million in mining revenue. Asset Management reported $8.6 million in Q4 management fees and $49 million for FY 2024. Digital Infrastructure generated $22.1 million in mining revenue in Q4. Galaxy's net digital assets exposure included bitcoin, ether, and other assets, with a balance sheet showing $7,187,452 million in assets as of December 31, 2024. Other highlights include Galaxy's intent to list on Nasdaq upon completion of pending SEC review and shareholder approvals, and potential U.S. tax implications for shareholders. The company's investor conference call was scheduled for March 28, 2025, at 8:30 AM ET.

PPI PIPE is first company globally to get "PFAS Tested" designation for PVC pipe; part of NSF/ANSI/CAN 61 certification.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, a major testing and certification organization in the water sector, NSF, has revealed that PPI PIPE Co. Ltd. has achieved a significant milestone. PPI PIPE, a prominent South Korean pipe producer, is now the pioneer in obtaining the NSF “+ PFAS Tested” label alongside their current certifications for NSF/ANSI/CAN 61 and NSF/ANSI 14. This designation recognizes their PVC pipe and fittings as meeting the standards for Drinking Water System Components and Plastics Piping System Components and Related Materials.

news.headline: Value stocks see gains, awaiting earnings for potential boost. #Investing #Stocks
Shareholders of ICON Public Limited Company (NASDAQ: ICLR) urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by April 11, 2025 regarding class action lawsuit.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP alerted investors in ICON Public Limited Company ("ICON" or the "Company") (NASDAQ: ICLR) about a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit aims to recuperate losses for ICON investors affected by alleged misconduct. The legal action specifically targets those who held shares of ICON during a certain period.

news.summary: Legal firm Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has alerted investors in Quantum Computing Inc. (NASDAQ: QUBT) about a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit aims to recover losses for investors in Quantum Computing Inc. The class action lawsuit has been filed due to declines in the company's stock.

The lawsuit aims to help investors recover losses incurred while investing in the Company. The legal firm is seeking compensation for damages suffered by investors in TFI International Inc.

news.headline: Treasury bills auction on 28 Mar 2025 yields successful results.

US stock futures fall after 2-day decline. Tariffs, Fed inflation measure impact. Nasdaq -0.40%, S&P 500 -0.22%, Dow Jones -0.15%, Russell 2000 +0.12%. SPY down to $565.98, QQQ down to $479.89. EU & Canada facing higher tariffs threat. Traders eyeing Fed's interest rates. Most S&P sectors red on Thursday. Mercedes-Benz & Porsche stocks drop. TD Synnex shares fall 14% after earnings report.
news.summary: US stock futures fell after two days of decline, affected by new auto tariffs on foreign cars. President Trump warned of higher tariffs on the EU and Canada if they retaliate. Market focused on inflation data, with core PCE index being a key indicator. 10-year Treasury yield at 4.32%, 2-year at 3.99%. Futures showed: Nasdaq 100 -0.40%, S&P 500 -0.22%, Dow Jones -0.15%, Russell 2000 +0.12%. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF dropped in premarket. S&P sectors mostly down on Thursday, with health care and consumer staples up. European automakers suffered losses. TD Synnex Corp. shares fell 14% after earnings report.

news.headline: IHI develops world's first gas-bearing vacuum pump for HLFC, reducing aircraft drag. Tests successful. #innovation #aerodynamics
news.summary: IHI Corporation based in Tokyo has recently achieved a milestone by successfully creating and conducting the first-ever testing of an innovative vacuum pump tailored for hybrid laminar flow control (HLFC) systems. The groundbreaking vacuum pump, incorporating a gas-bearing motor, plays a pivotal role in facilitating HLFC systems. These systems represent cutting-edge aerodynamic control technologies aimed at minimizing aircraft drag in low-pressure air conditions, where air density is approximately one-tenth of that at ground level.

news.headline: Notice has been given for the annual general meeting of Tivoli A/S as per article 8 of the articles of association.
news.summary: Notice is hereby provided for the annual general meeting of Tivoli A/S as per article 8 of the articles of association.

news.headline: Feldspar develops sensor-enabled track 20% more efficient, impressing UK's fastest young athletes in initial tests.
news.summary: Feldspar has achieved a significant milestone by finalizing the initial functional prototype of its sensor-equipped, top-quality track which represents a groundbreaking advancement in sports flooring technology. The track has been tested with some of the swiftest young athletes in the UK, demonstrating a 20% increase in efficiency compared to current models. This development marks an important step forward in enhancing athletic performance and highlights the potential benefits of Feldspar's innovative track.

Economist Peter Schiff criticizes Gamestop's Bitcoin strategy as shares plummet 22% in a day and 26% from the high. Smarter investors are selling off.
news.summary: Prominent economist Peter Schiff criticized GameStop Corp.’s Bitcoin investment approach as the company's stock plummeted. He noted that GME shares dropped by 22% in one day and were down 26% from the previous day's peak. Schiff labeled those who bought into the hype as "fools," pointing out that prudent investors are now leaving the market after realizing that investing in Bitcoin is not a sustainable business strategy. As a result, GameStop has faced significant losses. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Gstar accelerates setting up Indonesian silicon wafer plant with equipment shipment, marking a milestone in PV facility setup.
news.summary: A major achievement has been reached by Gstar in CIKARANG, Indonesia, as they recently sent out their initial shipment of essential equipment for their upcoming photovoltaic production plant. This shipment comprises monocrystalline growth furnaces along with their control systems. This step marks a crucial milestone for Gstar as they prepare to establish their manufacturing facility in Indonesia. The company is gearing up for the installation and operation of this core equipment, indicating progress and development in the renewable energy sector. The successful dispatch of this shipment sets the stage for further advancements in this venture, highlighting the company's dedication to expanding renewable energy infrastructure. With this new equipment in place, Gstar is poised to make a significant impact in the region.
